es.title: Noticias Diarias: Copyright e Inteligencia Artificial
es.subtitle: Lo último en leyes de derechos de autor para músicos, compositores y productores.

sections.title: La Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos se pronuncia sobre el caso de derechos de autor de AI
sections.content: En un fallo reciente, la Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos ha decidido que las obras creadas por inteligencia artificial no pueden ser registradas para obtener derechos de autor, lo que ha generado un debate entre los defensores de la propiedad intelectual y los desarrolladores de tecnología.

sections.title: Spotify y la empresa de IA, Amper Music, llegan a un acuerdo de licencia
sections.content: La plataforma de streaming de música, Spotify, ha anunciado un acuerdo de licencia con Amper Music, una empresa que utiliza inteligencia artificial para crear música. Este acuerdo permitirá a Spotify ofrecer contenido generado por IA a sus usuarios, lo que plantea nuevas preguntas sobre los derechos de autor y la remuneración de los creadores.

sections.title: Guía del día: Cómo proteger tus obras con IA
sections.content: Para proteger tus obras creadas con inteligencia artificial, es importante documentar el proceso de creación y mantener registros de la contribución humana en la obra. También es recomendable consultar con un abogado especializado en derechos de autor para entender las opciones legales disponibles y asegurarte de que tus derechos estén protegidos.

en.title: Daily News: Copyright & Artificial Intelligence
en.subtitle: The latest in copyright law for musicians, composers, and producers.

sections.title: US Supreme Court Rules on AI Copyright Case
sections.content: In a recent ruling, the US Supreme Court has decided that works created by artificial intelligence cannot be registered for copyright, sparking a debate between intellectual property advocates and technology developers. This decision is expected to have significant implications for the music industry, where AI-generated content is becoming increasingly prevalent.

sections.title: Spotify and AI Music Company Amper Music Reach Licensing Agreement
sections.content: Music streaming platform Spotify has announced a licensing agreement with Amper Music, a company that uses artificial intelligence to create music. This deal will allow Spotify to offer AI-generated content to its users, raising new questions about copyright and creator compensation. The agreement is seen as a significant step forward for the integration of AI-generated music into mainstream platforms.

sections.title: Today's Guide: Protecting Your AI-Assisted Works
sections.content: To protect your AI-assisted works, it's essential to document the creation process and maintain records of human contribution to the work. It's also recommended to consult with a copyright law specialist to understand the available legal options and ensure your rights are protected. Additionally, consider registering your work with the relevant copyright office, even if AI-generated elements are involved, to establish a paper trail and potential evidence of ownership.
